roles.title: Principal Engineer
roles.role_summary: Lead platform engineering strategy across a suite of cloud-native products serving 2M+ users. Partner with product and infrastructure teams to define technical roadmap, establish engineering standards, and mentor a growing team of engineers.

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer
roles.role_summary: Designed and delivered core API infrastructure supporting internal and external product integrations. Drove adoption of microservices patterns and championed observability improvements across the engineering org.

roles.title: Software Engineer II
roles.role_summary: Built and maintained backend services for a portfolio of client-facing data products. Coordinated delivery across multiple customer accounts and contributed to contract scoping and technical solutioning.

roles.title: Junior Software Developer
roles.role_summary: Developed web features and internal tooling for a small product studio serving early-stage startups. Gained hands-on experience across the full stack in a fast-paced environment.

resume_points.bullet_text: Reduced average API response latency by 42% by redesigning the internal gateway routing layer and introducing edge caching.
Consolidated 14 independently deployed microservices into a unified platform, cutting infrastructure costs by $380K annually.
Established an engineering guild model and bi-weekly tech talks that improved cross-team knowledge sharing and reduced repeated incidents by 35%.
Defined and rolled out a tiered on-call rotation for a team of 18 engineers, reducing mean time to acknowledge (MTTA) alerts from 22 minutes to under 4.
Delivered a public REST and GraphQL API gateway handling 8M+ requests per day with 99.97% uptime.
Re-architected a monolithic billing service into three independently deployable services, reducing deployment cycle time from 2 hours to 12 minutes.
Mentored 3 mid-level engineers through structured growth plans; all 3 were promoted within 18 months.
Built an inventory sync engine that reconciled 5M+ SKUs daily across three retail systems with sub-2-minute lag.
Migrated legacy ETL pipeline from nightly batch jobs to a streaming architecture, improving data freshness from 24 hours to under 10 minutes.
Shipped a client-facing dashboard that condensed a 6-step manual reporting workflow into a single-page view, saving each client an estimated 3 hours per week.

projects.summary: Designed and implemented a centralized API gateway to replace a fragmented set of service-to-service integrations. The gateway enforces auth, rate limiting, and observability for all internal and external traffic.
outcomes: Consolidated routing for 14 previously independent services
Enabled product teams to ship integrations 3x faster
Reduced security incident surface area by standardizing auth across all endpoints

projects.summary: Built an event-driven analytics pipeline to replace nightly batch reporting with near-real-time dashboards for product and growth teams.
outcomes: Replaced 4 separate nightly jobs with a single streaming pipeline
Enabled same-day product decisions previously impossible with batch data
Adopted as the standard analytics pattern across 6 other product teams

projects.summary: Developed a high-throughput inventory reconciliation service that synchronized product and stock data across three disparate retail systems for a major enterprise client.
outcomes: Eliminated manual reconciliation process that previously required a full-time analyst
Reduced out-of-stock incidents by 28% in the first quarter post-launch
Extended contract by 12 months due to client satisfaction

independent_projects.summary: An open-source GitHub App that surfaces PR review bottlenecks and cycle time trends for engineering teams. Generates weekly digests and integrates with Slack.
A lightweight tool for documenting and visualizing internal tech stacks. Teams can tag services, map dependencies, and export architecture diagrams.
